Package neqsim.process.safety.fire

Class PoolFireModel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.fire.PoolFireModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PoolFireModel extends Object implements Serializable
Pool-fire thermal radiation model for liquid hydrocarbon fires (API 521 / Mudan).

Computes burn rate (mass-burning velocity), pool diameter (steady or growing), flame height (Thomas correlation), surface emissive power (SEP), and view-factor-weighted incident heat flux at a receiver.

References:

  • API STD 521, §4.6 Pool fires
  • Mudan K.S. (1984) — Thermal radiation hazards from hydrocarbon pool fires. Prog. Energy Combust. Sci. 10, 59–80
  • Thomas P.H. (1963) — The size of flames from natural fires. 9th Symp. Combustion
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Description
    PoolFireModel(double poolDiameterM, double burnRateKgPerM2PerS, double heatOfCombustionJPerKg, double liquidDensityKgPerM3, double radiativeFraction)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    distanceToFlux(double targetFluxWperM2)
    Distance to a target heat-flux contour by simple bisection.
    double
    flameHeightM()
    Flame height (Thomas correlation, no wind): H/D = 42 · [m" / (ρa · √(g·D))]^0.61.
    double
    incidentHeatFlux(double distanceM)
    Incident heat flux at horizontal distance from pool, ground-level receiver.
    PoolFireModel
    setAirDensity(double rhoAir)
    Set ambient air density (default 1.20 kg/m³ at 20°C, sea level).
    double
    surfaceEmissivePowerWPerM2()
    Surface emissive power (SEP) using Mudan smoke-corrected correlation: SEP = SEP_max · exp(-s·D) + SEP_smoke · (1 − exp(-s·D)).
    double
    totalBurnRateKgPerS()
    Total mass-burning rate over the pool (kg/s).
    double
    viewFactorVertical(double distanceM)
    Approximate cylindrical-flame view factor at horizontal distance x from flame axis, receiver at ground level, normal-to-flame.

  • Constructor Details

    • PoolFireModel

      public PoolFireModel(double poolDiameterM, double burnRateKgPerM2PerS, double heatOfCombustionJPerKg, double liquidDensityKgPerM3, double radiativeFraction)
      Construct a pool-fire model.
      Parameters:
      poolDiameterM - equivalent circular pool diameter in m
      burnRateKgPerM2PerS - mass burning rate per unit area, kg/(m²·s) (typical 0.04 LNG, 0.055 gasoline, 0.078 crude oil)
      heatOfCombustionJPerKg - ΔHc lower heating value of fuel, J/kg
      liquidDensityKgPerM3 - liquid density, kg/m³
      radiativeFraction - fraction of combustion heat radiated (0.20 – 0.40)

  • Method Details

    • setAirDensity

      public PoolFireModel setAirDensity(double rhoAir)
      Set ambient air density (default 1.20 kg/m³ at 20°C, sea level).
      Parameters:
      rhoAir - air density in kg/m³
      Returns:
      this model for chaining

    • totalBurnRateKgPerS

      public double totalBurnRateKgPerS()
      Total mass-burning rate over the pool (kg/s).
      Returns:
      total burn rate in kg/s

    • flameHeightM

      public double flameHeightM()
      Flame height (Thomas correlation, no wind): H/D = 42 · [m" / (ρa · √(g·D))]^0.61.
      Returns:
      flame height in m

    • surfaceEmissivePowerWPerM2

      public double surfaceEmissivePowerWPerM2()
      Surface emissive power (SEP) using Mudan smoke-corrected correlation: SEP = SEP_max · exp(-s·D) + SEP_smoke · (1 − exp(-s·D)).
      Returns:
      SEP in W/m²

    • viewFactorVertical

      public double viewFactorVertical(double distanceM)
      Approximate cylindrical-flame view factor at horizontal distance x from flame axis, receiver at ground level, normal-to-flame.
      Parameters:
      distanceM - horizontal distance from pool centre in m
      Returns:
      view factor (dimensionless, 0..1)

    • incidentHeatFlux

      public double incidentHeatFlux(double distanceM)
      Incident heat flux at horizontal distance from pool, ground-level receiver.
      Parameters:
      distanceM - distance from pool centre in m
      Returns:
      heat flux in W/m²

    • distanceToFlux

      public double distanceToFlux(double targetFluxWperM2)
      Distance to a target heat-flux contour by simple bisection.
      Parameters:
      targetFluxWperM2 - target heat flux in W/m²
      Returns:
      distance in m
